title: Project 121
description: A elegantly clean modpack that focuses on vanilla compatibility.
body:
Project 121 is a vanilla+ modpack that aims to make the vanilla experience compatible with unmodded clients. The sole focus is allowing players from both sides of minecraft to share experiences together on a mutual server. This modpack achieves this by implementing solely client side or server side mods. Upload the mods folder to a fabric server and enjoy.

- 100 mods
- 20 resource packs
- 1 shader pack

**Together they make Project 121 the ultimate vanilla experience!!!**

[Vanilla Tweaks](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/)
